cedict_en: disaster; calamity/variant of 災|灾[zai1]/old variant of 災|灾[zai1]

must_distinguish.note: 灾 often functions as a morpheme in compounds (灾区, 救灾); 灾害 is the standard standalone formal noun for disaster

cedict_en: to feel vexed/to bother/to trouble/superfluous and confusing/edgy

must_distinguish.note: 烦 = feel irritated or to bother sb (verb/adj, surface reaction); 烦恼 = inner vexation, worried trouble (deeper emotional state); 恼火 = angry-annoyed (stronger, outward irritation)

meaning_en: burn; cook over heat; have fever
cedict_en: to burn; to set on fire/to heat (over a fire); to boil (water, tea etc)/to braise/to cook; to prepare food/to run a fever/fever/(coll.) to become full of oneself; to get carried away
dataset_meanings: (coll.) to let things go to one's head

must_distinguish.note: 烧 = burn / cook by heat / have a fever (broad, colloquial); 烘 = bake/dry using indirect heat (oven, fire nearby); 煮 = boil/cook by simmering in liquid.
煤 = coal (common root word, everyday use); 煤炭 = coal (fuller formal/industrial term, e.g. in reports or energy sector)
气体 = gas as a physical state (science); 天然气 = natural gas (utility); 煤气 = coal gas / domestic gas (cooking/heating); 柴油 = diesel fuel (vehicles); 燃料 = fuel in general (any type)
气体 = gas as a physical state (science); 天然气 = natural gas (utility); 煤气 = coal gas / domestic gas (cooking/heating); 柴油 = diesel fuel (vehicles); 燃料 = fuel in general (any type)

cedict_en: to love; to be fond of; to like/affection/to be inclined (to do sth); to tend to (happen)
dataset_meanings: to love; to be fond of; to like
to be inclined (to do sth); to tend to (happen)

must_distinguish.note: 爱 = love/like (broad, deep); 喜爱 = like/be fond of (preference, lighter); 热爱 = love ardently (a cause, career, country); 恋爱 = be romantically in love (relationship state).
爸 is the everyday informal word for 'dad'; 父亲 (5k) is the formal/written term for 'father'
牌子 is the colloquial spoken form for brand or sign (名牌子); 牌 is the base form and also covers playing cards and game tiles — wider range than 牌子.

cedict_en: property/real estate/abbr. for 物業管理|物业管理[wu4 ye4 guan3 li3], property management
dataset_meanings: abbr. for 物业管理, property management

must_distinguish.note: 价格 (5k) = market price of a specific item; 物价 = commodity price level in general (macro); 代价 (5k) = figurative cost/sacrifice; 降价 = the action of cutting the price
特性 = intrinsic property, often scientific/technical; 特点 = distinctive feature/trait (neutral, everyday); 性质 = essential nature or character of something
蒙 = bluff/guess blindly (colloquial, no basis); 猜 = guess (everyday, intuitive); 猜测 = guess/conjecture (more considered, some basis); 推测 = surmise/infer (reasoned, evidence-based deduction)
猴子 is the everyday standalone word for monkey; 猴 is the morpheme/character used in compounds and as the zodiac animal name

cedict_en: surname Huan/ring/hoop/loop/(chain) link/classifier for scores in archery etc/to surround/to encircle/to hem in
dataset_meanings: classifier for scores in archery etc

must_distinguish.note: 环 = ring/loop shape (generic, also a link/component); 戒指 = finger ring (jewelry only)
班级 = class as an administrative unit (the homeroom group); 课堂 = classroom/class as the instructional space or session

cedict_en: to generate; to produce; to form; to be formed; to come into being/to be born with; to be blessed with
dataset_meanings: to generate; to produce; to form; to be formed; to come into being
to be born with; to be blessed with

must_distinguish.note: 生成 = generate/produce (technical/computational output); 形成 = form/take shape (gradual structural emergence); 产生 = arise/generate (cause-effect, broad — results, emotions, problems)

cedict_en: to grow/to grow up/to be brought up

must_distinguish.note: 长大 = grow up (humans reaching adulthood); 成长 = grow/mature (personal development, also broad); 生长 = grow (biological — plants, organisms); 栽培 = cultivate (plants) or mentor (people, formal)
电子版 = specifically the electronic/digital format; 版本 = any version or edition regardless of medium
电视剧 = TV drama/series (medium-specific); 连续剧 = serial/series (emphasises ongoing episodes); 戏剧 = drama/theater (art form, stage or screen); 悲剧 = tragedy (a genre, also fig. 'a tragedy')
男人 = everyday neutral 'man'; 男子 = formal/literary noun (sports, legal); 男性 = gender-category term (demographic/scientific); 男 = bound prefix in compounds
男子 = man/male (formal noun, e.g. in 男子组); 男士 = gentleman/man (polite address, service contexts); 绅士 = gentleman (implies refined conduct, Western overtone)

cedict_en: erhua form of 男孩[nan2 hai2]

must_distinguish.note: 男孩儿 = young boy (child); 男生 = male student/boy (school context); 少年 = teenage youth (10–16); 小伙子 = young man/lad (informal); 青年 = young adult (18–35, formal/official)

cedict_en: scene/tableau/picture/image/screen (displayed by a computer)/(motion picture) frame/field of view

must_distinguish.note: 相片 = photograph (physical/personal print); 图片 = image/picture (digital or generic); 画面 = visual frame/scene (video, screen, painted composition)

cedict_en: to get well/to heal/to recuperate/to convalesce/convalescence/to nurse

must_distinguish.note: 疗养 = recuperate with medical treatment (sanatorium-style); 休养 = recover through rest (no emphasis on treatment)
病人 = sick person/patient (everyday spoken); 患者 = patient (formal medical/written context)
痛 = physical pain/ache (neutral); 疼 = physical ache, often with tenderness or affection ('dote on'); 痛苦 = suffering/anguish (emotional or profound physical — a noun/adj)

cedict_en: to scale (a height)/to ascend/to mount/to publish or record/to enter (e.g. in a register)/to press down with the foot/to step or tread on/to put on (shoes or trousers) (dialect)/to be gathered and taken to the threshing ground (old)
dataset_meanings: to press down with the foot
to be gathered and taken to the threshing ground (old)

must_distinguish.note: 登山 = mountain climbing (sport/activity as a whole); 登 = ascend/climb (general, incl. stairs, stages); 攀登 = scale/climb (effort-intensive, figurative too: 攀登高峰).
登山 = mountain climbing (sport/activity as a whole); 登 = ascend/climb (general, incl. stairs, stages); 攀登 = scale/climb (effort-intensive, figurative too: 攀登高峰).

cedict_en: surname Bai/Bai ethnic group/white/snowy/pure/bright/empty/blank/plain/clear/to make clear/in vain/gratuitous/free of charge/reactionary/anti-communist/funeral/to stare coldly/to write wrong character/to state/to explain/vernacular/spoken lines in opera

must_distinguish.note: 白 is the adjective/morpheme (白雪, 白天); 白色 is the standalone noun 'the color white' used in naming or labeling.
白 is the adjective/morpheme (白雪, 白天); 白色 is the standalone noun 'the color white' used in naming or labeling.

cedict_en: baijiu, a spirit usually distilled from sorghum/(Tw) white wine (abbr. for 白葡萄酒[bai2 pu2 tao5 jiu3])
dataset_meanings: baijiu, a spirit usually distilled from sorghum

must_distinguish.note: 货 = goods/cargo (general, incl. freight); 百货 = general merchandise (retail variety); 商品 = commodity (market economics term); 产品 = product (manufactured output); 物资 = supplies/materials (logistics, often strategic)

cedict_en: surname Pi/skin; peel; rind; outer layer/leather; hide; fur/cover; wrapping; outer covering/(of food) no longer crisp; soggy/(coll.) naughty; mischievous/pico- (10⁻¹²)

must_distinguish.note: 皮 = skin/peel/leather (broad: body skin, fruit skin, leather material); 皮肤 = skin specifically as a body organ (medical/biological usage).

cedict_en: tray; plate; dish/(finance) (bound form) market prices/(computing) (bound form) disk/to coil (a rope, pigtail etc)/to check; to examine; to investigate/to transfer; to sell (property)/to shift; to move (sth big and heavy)/classifier for things resembling a plate or dish/classifier for coils/classifier for games or matches (chess, table tennis etc)
camera (abbr. for 照相機|照相机[zhao4 xiang4 ji1])/at the opportune moment/as the circumstances allow

must_distinguish.note: 照相机 is the full traditional form (photo-taking machine); 相机 is the shortened modern everyday form. 相机 also informally covers digital cameras and some video cameras.
相比 = compare (general, often in 相比之下 'by comparison'). 对比 = contrast (highlight differences, includes noun 'contrast'). 对照 = compare side-by-side (check against, verify).
相片 = photograph (physical/personal print); 图片 = image/picture (digital or generic); 画面 = visual frame/scene (video, screen, painted composition)
All express 'seems like'. 看上去 is specifically visual ('looks like', based on sight); 好像 is colloquial general resemblance; 似乎 is literary/tentative ('it would appear').
看成/视为 = regard X as Y (equating two things); 视为 is more formal/written; 看待 = treat/view (attitude toward something); 认为 = hold an opinion, think that

cedict_en: to see; to catch sight of

must_distinguish.note: 看见 = catch sight of (emphasises moment of visual perception); 看到 = see/notice (slightly broader, neutral result)

cedict_en: seemingly; apparently; looks as if; appears to be; gives the impression that; seems on the face of it to be
dataset_meanings: seems on the face of it to be

must_distinguish.note: All express 'seems/appears'; 好像 is colloquial and can also mean 'like'; 似乎 is more tentative and written; 看起来 is literal 'looking at it, it seems' — visual-based inference.
泪 is the literary/bare morpheme (poetry, compounds); 泪水 is more expressive/written (emphasizes the physical liquid); 眼泪 is the neutral everyday word for 'tears' (spoken and written).
短处 = personal weak point, informal and often self-deprecating; 缺点 = general flaw or shortcoming in anything; 弱点 = a vulnerability or soft spot that can be exploited.

cedict_en: to research and manufacture; to research and to develop
dataset_meanings: to research and manufacture; to research and to develop

must_distinguish.note: 研制 = R&D-based creation of a specific product; 开发 = exploit/open up (resources, software, land); 发展 = grow/expand something already existing

cedict_en: to come across/to run into/to meet/to hit

must_distinguish.note: 碰到 = run into accidentally; 见 = to see/meet (neutral, general); 逢 = happen to meet, on a recurring occasion (literary); 会晤 = formal meeting (diplomatic/official)

cedict_en: surname Li/abbr. for 禮記|礼记[Li3 ji4], Classic of Rites/gift/rite/ceremony/CL:份[fen4]/propriety/etiquette/courtesy
dataset_meanings: abbr. for 礼记, Classic of Rites

must_distinguish.note: 礼 = broad concept: ritual propriety AND gift; 礼节 = specific ceremonial etiquette and rites; 礼貌 = everyday polite manner/courtesy

cedict_en: ticket/ballot/banknote/CL:張|张[zhang1]/person held for ransom/amateur performance of Chinese opera/classifier for groups, batches, business transactions
dataset_meanings: classifier for groups, batches, business transactions

must_distinguish.note: 票 = ticket (general: transport, event, admission); 票价 = the price of a ticket / fare; 彩票 = lottery ticket (a ticket bought for a chance to win, not for entry).
票 = ticket (general: transport, event, admission); 票价 = the price of a ticket / fare; 彩票 = lottery ticket (a ticket bought for a chance to win, not for entry).

cedict_en: surname Fu/abbr. for Fujian province 福建省[Fu2 jian4 Sheng3]/good fortune/happiness/luck

must_distinguish.note: 运气 = luck (good or bad, neutral); 好运 = good luck (simply positive); 福 = blessing/fortune (cultural, ceremonial); 福气 = blessed lot/good fortune (earned or destined, warm)
秋季 = formal/written 'autumn season' (used in official, sports, or compound contexts); 秋 = general spoken/written 'autumn', also used in idioms

All relate to 'kind/type'. 类 is the abstract class/category (morpheme); 种类 = the variety/range of types (diverse spread); 类型 = a specific classified type; 品种 = breed or commercial variety (biological/product).

All express 'type/kind/variety'; 种类 = range of categories (countable set); 类 = broad class/genus; 类型 = formal typed classification; 样式 = visible style or pattern; 品种 = variety/breed (biological or product).
积极性 = enthusiasm as an abstract capacity or quality (formal); 干劲 = work drive, practical zeal (colloquial); 劲头 = vigor or spirit in the moment (colloquial, vivid)

cedict_en: to move/to shift/to change/to alter/to remove

must_distinguish.note: 移 = move/shift (general, can be figurative: emigrate, transfer); 挪 = physically nudge/shift a small object to make room (colloquial, concrete)
稳 is a monosyllabic adjective ('steady, not wobbling'); 稳定 is a disyllabic adj/noun/verb meaning 'stable; stability; to stabilize' — broader, used in formal and abstract contexts.
All involve sky/air. 空中 = mid-air/airspace (where planes fly); 天上 = up in the sky/heavens (celestial, poetic); 天空 = the sky as a visual expanse (noun); 太空 = outer space (beyond atmosphere).
窗子 and 窗户 (5k) both mean 'window' and are nearly interchangeable in speech; 窗子 is slightly more colloquial/northern, 窗户 is the standard everyday form.

cedict_en: to come to a stop; to halt/to keep one's footing; to stay upright/(fig.) to hold one's ground; to gain a firm foothold/(of an assertion etc) to hold up; to be tenable

must_distinguish.note: 站住 = imperative 'halt!/stop!' (physical, directed at a person); 停止 = cease an ongoing action (neutral, intransitive); 阻止 = block/prevent something already underway (transitive); 拦 = physically intercept or block passage.
